description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a broad, reddish-brown carapace and two large, prominent claws (chelae) raised in a defensive posture. The crab's body is segmented into a cephalothorax and a small, tucked abdomen, with the carapace displaying a smooth, slightly glossy surface. It has eight slender, jointed walking legs, each ending in pointed tips, and the claws are robust with white, serrated pincers. The eyes are small and set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, giving the crab a vigilant appearance. Subtle color variations are visible, with lighter tones on the underside and tips of the claws, and darker hues on the upper shell and legs. The overall form and texture suggest a hard, chitinous exoskeleton typical of marine crabs.
description: A reddish-brown crab with large white-tipped claws, eight jointed legs, and a hard, glossy shell.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the crab's broad carapace, both large claws raised, and all eight legs visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the claws and the segmentation of the legs, with one claw more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back of the carapace and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs and claws.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view focusing on the underside of the claws and the curvature of the legs.
